items.title: Gas tax: How beer fuelled a debate on Australia's energy giants
items.dek: Campaigners say Australia is giving away its gas 'for free' and should tax exports like Norway and Qatar.
items.body: Campaigners say Australia is giving away its gas 'for free' and should tax exports like Norway and Qatar.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man in hospital after car slams into wall painted like a tunnel

items.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship leaves Cape Verde after three evacuated
items.dek: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.
items.body: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.
